message:
🌱 flux: Create architecture telemetry in the gotk (#1836)

* 🌱 Add flux: Create architecture telemetry in the gotk mission

* 🌱 Add flux: Create architecture telemetry in the gotk mission

@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "flux-493-create-architecture-telemetry-in-the-gotk",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "flux: Create architecture telemetry in the gotk",
+    "description": "Create architecture telemetry in the gotk. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current flux deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your flux version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nhelm list -n flux 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working flux installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review flux configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant flux configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nkubectl get configmap -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flux\n```\nEvening,\n\nI'm inquiring for the feasibility of adding telemetry to your images hosted on ghcr. I came across this [discussion](https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2/discussions/303) earlier today."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Create architecture telemetry in the gotk",
+        "description": "Happy to announce that we simply had to wait a tiny bit till GitHub released statistics per image layer, which they just did.\n\nThis means that we are now able to merge the images together and remove the arch selector from the manifests, but this will likely not happen before the new year.\n\nBest wishes, and see you in 2021\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux\nkubectl get events -n flux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Create architecture telemetry in the gotk\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Happy to announce that we simply had to wait a tiny bit till GitHub released statistics per image layer, which they just did.\n\nThis means that we are now able to merge the images together and remove the arch selector from the manifests, but this will likely not happen before the new year.\n\nBest wishes, and see you in 2021",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "flux",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "flux"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2/issues/493",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 5,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with flux installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:36:32.059Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
